post.message: Team, as part of our efforts to maintain up-to-date personnel data, I am pleased to report that 79% of our employees have updated their ID photos this year. This is a significant increase compared to last year's update rate. Let's continue to encourage the rest to complete their updates as well.
The Q1 sales reports are in. We've seen a significant increase in EV sales in the western region. I'll share the detailed report shortly.
We need to keep an eye on our competitors' new EV models. I've scheduled a meeting next week to discuss this.
Noted, Jane. Looking forward to reviewing the data. I've also been doing some research on potential markets for expansion.
Great point, John. We should definitely consider potential markets for our next EV model.
I agree, expansion is key. Let's also focus on improving customer service to retain our current customers.
Absolutely, Jane. Customer retention is as important as acquisition. Let's discuss this in our next meeting.
Noted, Ryan. I'll prepare some data on customer retention for our meeting.
